title: "Best of Graaff-Reinet" winners announced
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Over the past four...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gallery","html":"Gallery"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Over the past four months, our readers have spoken and it gives us great pleasure to announce and congratulate the winners of the","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Over the past four months, our readers have spoken and it gives us great pleasure to announce and congratulate the winners of the"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"2024 Best of Graaff-Reinet Readers’ Choice Awards!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you to the people of Graaff-Reinet – your nominations and votes for your favourite businesses in Graaff-Reinet are the foundation of this project.","html":"Thank you to the people of Graaff-Reinet – your nominations and votes for your favourite businesses in Graaff-Reinet are the foundation of this project."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The overwhelming response and participation from our loyal readers, and the community’s shared excitement has reaffirmed what we believed could be an uplifting and enriching project for businesses in our beautiful town.","html":"The overwhelming response and participation from our loyal readers, and the community’s shared excitement has reaffirmed what we believed could be an uplifting and enriching project for businesses in our beautiful town."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"PHOTO GALLERY: Best of Graaff-Reinet winners"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lots of respect to every nominated business, and a massive congratulations to each of our 2024 category winners – you make Graaff-Reinet proud!","html":"Lots of respect to every nominated business, and a massive congratulations to each of our 2024 category winners – you make Graaff-Reinet proud!"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The 2024 winners are: Click here to see them all"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The 2024 Best of Graaff-Reinet Readers’ Choice Awards supplement is available in today's issue of the Graaff-Reinet Advertiser.","html":"The 2024 Best of Graaff-Reinet Readers’ Choice Awards supplement is available in today's issue of the Graaff-Reinet Advertiser."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
